qids.subject: Databases
qids.prose: Consider the following two tables named Raider and Team in a relational database maintained by a Kabaddi league. The attribute ID in table Team references the primary key of the Raider table, ID. The SQL query described below is executed on this database: SELECT * FROM Raider, Team WHERE Raider.ID=T
